terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.legal_footer: For legal inquiries, please contact us at legal@orionsoftware.com

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using this dental management platform, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please refrain from using the service.

privacy.title: 2. Privacy and Medical Data
privacy.content: All patient information is handled under strict confidentiality standards and local health data protection regulations.

responsibility.title: 3. Professional Responsibility
responsibility.content: The professional is responsible for the accuracy of diagnoses. The platform is a support tool and does not substitute professional clinical judgment.

data_ownership.title: 4. Data Ownership
data_ownership.content: You retain all rights to your patient data. Our platform only acts as a custodian and processor of said information.

subscription.title: 5. Payments and Subscriptions
subscription.content: Access to advanced features requires an active subscription. Failure to pay will result in restricted access to editing functions.

backups.title: 6. Backups
backups.content: We perform automatic daily backups. However, it is recommended that professionals export their critical reports periodically.

termination.title: 7. Termination of Service
termination.content: You may cancel your account at any time. In case of closure, you will be granted a 30-day period to export clinical information before its permanent deletion.

404.404_description: We're sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

notice.title: Important Notice
notice.description: Critical security notifications (login from new device, password changes) cannot be disabled to ensure account security. SMS notifications may incur additional charges from your carrier.

categories.title: Data Categories
categories.subtitle: Select which data categories to include in backups
categories.minSelection: Select at least one category to create a backup.

deleteModal.title: Delete Record
deleteModal.subtitle: This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.body: Only the history record will be deleted. The downloaded .json file will not be affected.

restoreModal.description: This action will overwrite existing data with the selected file.
restoreModal.warningText: Existing records will be overwritten with the backup data. This action cannot be undone.
restoreModal.dragAndDrop: Drag your file here or click to browse
restoreModal.fileTypeHint: Only .json files generated by this app

warning.title: Restore Warning
warning.description: Restoring from a backup will replace all current data with the backup data. This action cannot be undone. Always create a manual backup before restoring.

deleteCategory.title: Delete category
deleteCategory.warning: This action may affect system functionality.
deleteCategory.effect1: Associated services will be left uncategorized.
deleteCategory.effect3: Reports using this category will show incomplete data.
deleteCategory.confirmLabel: I understand this action may affect the system and wish to continue.

features.twoFactorDesc: Require 2FA for all user accounts to enhance security
features.sessionTimeoutDesc: Log out users after 30 minutes of inactivity
features.passwordPolicyDesc: Enforce complex passwords with minimum 12 characters
features.auditLoggingDesc: Track all system access and data modifications

compliance.hipaaDesc: Healthcare Insurance Portability and Accountability Act
compliance.encryptionDesc: AES-256 encryption for data at rest and in transit
compliance.accessControlDesc: Granular permissions based on user roles

security.recommendationDesc: Regular security audits are recommended every 90 days. Your next audit is scheduled for 04/15/2026. Ensure all staff complete security training before the audit date.

integrations.noResults: No integrations found matching your criteria
integrations.customIntegrationDesc: Contact our support team to discuss custom integration options for your practice. We can help connect DentalCare Manager with your existing tools and workflows.

descriptions.dropbox: Store and share patient documents and clinical images securely
